name: Lena Wagner
title: HR Recruiterin / Talent Acquisition Specialist
organization_type: Fast-growing SaaS company, 80 employees, hiring 20 this quarter

daily_reality.typical_day: Runs 6-8 interview slots per day across 4 open roles. Each role has a 4-stage pipeline: screening call (15min), technical interview (60min), team fit (45min), final with Geschäftsführung (30min). Coordinates availability of 8 interviewers. Candidates are across DE, NL, PL, ES.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Coordinating 8 interviewers' availability. Candidates in different timezones. No-shows (15% rate). Rescheduling cascades when an interviewer calls in sick. Calendly Teams plan costs €128/month for 8 users.
daily_reality.weekly_volume: 30-40 interview slots/week, 10+ reschedules, coordinates with 8 interviewers
decision_criteria_for_tool: Must support round-robin and collective scheduling

psychology.tech_savviness: high — digital native, uses 10+ SaaS tools daily
psychology.risk_tolerance: moderate — willing to switch if candidate experience improves
psychology.decision_speed: fast — will pilot for 2 weeks, needs quick proof of value
frustration_triggers: expensive per-seat pricing (8 interviewers × €16 = too much)
no DSGVO consent checkbox on booking

first_screen: Team dashboard: all interviewers, their availability, today's interviews
Interview pipeline view (how many at each stage)
Quick links to create new interview event types
must_have: Multiple event types per interview stage
DSGVO consent checkbox on booking page
deal_breakers: Candidate booking page is confusing or ugly
expectations.current_pain_level: 8/10 — Calendly Teams is too expensive and no-shows are killing productivity
